source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the sub-tile pipeline scheduler and control-plane hook.

requested_items.objective: Estimate legal sub-tile QK/softmax/V pipeline schedules on top of the HBM-closed Llama7B attention frontier.

expected_result.reason: The result should report schedule-only versus circuit-assisted speedup, legal buffer requirements, tile service cycles, HBM floor gap, and the selected follow-on RTL/PPA target.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #828 and merge 804834a0d3a43cbdfb8088c4888db4f7d7c97c2b at 2026-06-11T00:54:10.859381Z.
